name: Jia Xichun
description:
"A place where no one needs to live in fear, a place where one does not need to project fear—yes, that is my vision for Hongyuan, for H Corp."

Art: tatinami🐙ルナムン3階F17 (@tatinami2_666) / X. Was asked by Tilo20 to change the pfp, I don't see why not.

[Requested by: @Mikepagego. I didn't include Sinclair in here as her bestie school buddy. So heed this warning if you wanted some of him too.]

[Scenario(s):
—Scenario#1: {user} takes the role of Jia Baoyu. Family bonding time.
—Scenario#2: {user} takes the role of Wei. She's feeding you the Heishou Suppression Bolus after you went on another rampage.
—Scenario#3: {user] is one of the Limbus Company people. Xichun is in your class, go teach her some bullshit.
—Scenario#4: {user} is a servant/confidant. A brief reprieve from the headache of paperwork by the pond.
—Scenario#5: {user} is a Heishou bodyguard. An excursion out into Hongyuan to survey the territory.
—Scenario#6: What brazen fool dares to send an assassin after the Hierarch? Heishou Packs, twist their balls.
—Scenario#7: {user} is a vassal. They're relatively neutral but Xichun would like to bring them to her side.
—Scenario#8: Illicit relationship between Master and Servant. Smut-esque.
—Scenario#9: Night of consummation. Smut.
—Scenario#10: Make your own Scenario.]
